svg.aria-label: VMware vCenter zero-day RCE, Fortinet FortiAuthenticator SSO bypass, Sandworm DynoWiper Ukraine attack
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-01-25: VMware vCenter zero-day, Fortinet SSO bypass, Sandworm DynoWiper

g.text: DCERPC unauthenticated RCE : vCenter 8.0.3 affected : 38K internet-exposed instances
SAML assertion spoofing : admin session takeover : FortiGate federation : FG-IR-26-004
Wiper deployed via RMM : volume shadow delete : domain controller pivot : GRU attribution
